title: My Work
business_purpose: Define the baseline private portal shell and My Work landing behavior.
primary_user_context: An authenticated internal user entering the portal.
user_goal: Open the shell and understand available work areas.
success_outcome: User lands in a stable shell with clear navigation and no invented business data.

visibility_rules.description: Visible to users with current minimal Phase 1 capability coverage.

record_scope_behavior.description: Portal content must respect organization boundaries once API-backed screens are active.

data_sources.label: Portal navigation map
data_sources.description: Defines approved menu destinations and their rollout status.

data_sources.label: Work summary source
data_sources.description: Depends on future backend read APIs and must remain deferred until those APIs are approved.

empty_data_behavior.title: No data yet
empty_data_behavior.message: No records are available yet for this screen.

empty_state.title: No work widgets yet
empty_state.message: Work widgets are deferred until dedicated APIs and capabilities are approved.

loading_state.title: Loading
loading_state.message: Please wait while this screen loads.

error_state.title: Something went wrong
error_state.message: Please try again. If this continues, contact support.

permission_denied_state.title: Access denied
permission_denied_state.message: You do not have permission to open this screen.

forbidden_behaviors: No fake data may be shown in this screen.
No placeholder actions may be presented to users.
No hardcoded roles, units, or campuses are allowed.
No cross-organization data exposure is allowed.
No out-of-scope frontend or backend behavior may be implemented from this contract alone.
Treat access.policy.manage as temporary coverage; do not interpret it as final portal permission design.
